messages.content: 将我的vlm prompt翻译为英文：“扩写这段文本prompt使之更加详细，用于文本到图像生成。请注意新的prompt需要和原本prompt保持相同的语义。不要返回任何其他文本。”
“Expand this text prompt to make it more detailed for text-to-image generation. Note that the new prompt must preserve the same meaning as the original prompt. Do not return any other text.”
